item.title: Eli Lilly/AC Immune Alzheimer's Collaboration
item.description:
• Summary: Eli Lilly has expanded its collaboration with AC Immune, paying $125 million to advance a small-molecule Alzheimer's disease drug closer to clinical trials. The partnership focuses on developing therapies targeting pathological proteins like tau or amyloid-beta, aiming to address neurodegenerative mechanisms.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech
